text:
Upgrade astro/xplanet (xplanet 0.50).
Changes to port:

	   Requested by: Hari Nair <hari@alumni.caltech.edu>,
	   esteemed author of xplanet.

How-To-Repeat: 
Use the shar below to import the new port to the tree.
